questions.question: Describe the concept of data hiding in text-based features and explain its applications.
questions.hint: This question requires a detailed explanation.

questions.question: How does watermarking in data hiding work, and what are its advantages?
questions.hint: Focus on the technical aspect of the question.

questions.question: What are some intuitive methods for data hiding, and how do they differ from simple digital methods?
questions.hint: This question requires a clear distinction between the two types of methods.
